scope: every parent, every representation, every promotion decision

supersedes.metric: raw activation cosine as a promotion criterion
supersedes.reason: target activations are mean-dominated, so a constant predictor scores 0.83 to 0.91 raw cosine and every reported weight-space score was below its own null

nulls.void_if: any null statistic is calculated from held-out targets

metrics.centered_cosine: cosine(y - mu_fit, yhat - mu_fit); the promotion cosine
metrics.per_position_skill: p05, median, p95, fraction of positions with skill > 0
metrics.skill_lower: 5th-percentile bootstrap lower bound over held-out positions, 512 resamples

gate.domain_gate: replication on unfitted documents and domains without refit
gate.seed_gate: replication under fresh student seeds without refit

bootstrap.statistic: ratio of sums over resampled held-out positions, not mean of per-position ratios

reissue_rule: recompute null-corrected metrics from sealed predictions where they exist
invalidate only claims that depended on the broken metric
preserve exact payload, byte and accounting evidence unchanged
write a superseding receipt naming the artifact and the claim it replaces
